name: Harvey Harvington (SoftMoney AU)
description:
Tired of constant violence against Harvey? Tired of watching him suffer time after time? Think that he deserves better?

Then this game is for you!

The same $25,000 for the operation. The same stall on the side of the road. The same $1 per click. But with just one big difference: no more suffering for Harvey!

SoftMoney is a fan project based on the game BloodMoney, which, unlike the original one, has NO bad endings!

Download the game! https://paper-pepper.itch.io/softmoney
creator: AndriuxDev
